title: Chief Academic Officer
notes: CMSD has a dedicated Office of Early Childhood and Literacy Education (216-838-0231). Major urban district with PRE4CLE partnership; runs ODEW-funded preschool sites. Dr. Selena Florence oversees curriculum/academics including ECE. Email not published; pattern is typically first.last@clevelandmetroschools.org. Office staff includes Gloriane Smith (Early Learning and Literacy Manager PK-5).

title: Assistant Superintendent, Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Dr. Wanda Lash oversees curriculum, learning specialists, and school improvement. APS runs a large Early Learning Program (preschool.akronschools.com) for typically developing and special needs students. APS email domain is @apslearns.org (not @akronschools.com). New superintendent Mary Outley appointed April 2025.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Teaching and Learning
notes: Dave Pilati leads T&L for district. Email pattern likely first.last@northcantonschools.org. District operates North Canton Primary School (PreK-K). Background: former curriculum director at Plain Local and curriculum consultant at Stark County ESC.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Lakota is the largest district in Butler County (~15,000 students) with six early childhood (PK-2) schools. Lori Brown appointed Executive Director of C&I April 2024. Emily Hermann serves as Director of K-6 Curriculum. District uses Hopewell ECC and Liberty ECC. Inquiries route through LakotaLearning@lakotaonline.com. New superintendent Dr. Ashley Whitely incoming from Wyoming City.

title: Executive Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: Dublin runs a dedicated preschool (preschool.dublinschools.net) with Vanessa Ohlinger as Principal. Lori Marple oversees T&L district-wide including PreK. Email pattern marple_lori@dublinschools.net likely. PK-12 Coordinator of Curriculum: Christina Hutchinson.

title: Executive Director of Curriculum & Learning
notes: Sycamore operates the Sycamore Drive Early Childhood Learning Center, Gold Level Step Up To Quality (Ohio Dept of Children & Youth). Uses Creative Curriculum for Preschool, Letterland Phonics, Pearson EnVision Math. Becky Tompkins promoted to Executive Director of Curriculum & Learning.

title: Assistant Superintendent / Curriculum Director
notes: Lebanon runs Bowman Primary preschool (5-Star/Gold Step Up to Quality). Anna Maratos handles preschool special education (513-934-5465). Mark Graler elevated from Curriculum Director to Assistant Superintendent. Email pattern likely first.last@lebanonschools.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Springfield Local (New Middletown, Mahoning County) is a small district. Rachael Smith identified as superintendent. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director surfaced publicly. Email pattern likely first.last@springfieldspartans.org.

title: Director of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Shaker Heights opened the Ludlow Early Learning Center in fall 2025 - the only program in Ohio incorporating IB Primary Years Programme philosophy. Dr. John Moore leads curriculum. Major strategic ECE investment. Noreen Smyth-Morrow handles ECE special ed (216-295-4090).

title: Director of Instruction and Innovation
notes: Pat Geschke oversees curriculum/instruction district-wide. District serves PreK-12 in Medina County.

title: Superintendent (vacant/in transition)
notes: Small rural district in Leesburg, Highland County. Superintendent position posted on iHireSchoolAdministrators (April 2026), indicating vacancy/transition. Previous superintendent Tim Dettwiller retired July 2022. Recommend contacting district office directly for current ECE/curriculum lead.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Sue Brackenhoff oversees curriculum K-12 including preschool program at Fairborn Primary. District has free all-day kindergarten at Wright campus. Email pattern likely first.last@fairborn.k12.oh.us.

title: Chief Curriculum Officer
notes: Ben Spieldenner is Chief Curriculum Officer. District runs Ashland Preschool Program; Kristy Tucker is Director of Student Services and primary preschool contact. Dr. Tammy Stevens is Assistant Superintendent of Student Services.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district in Wyandot County. Laurie Vent has been superintendent (one source noted retirement Jan 2021 but more recent sources confirm her in role through 2025-2026 board meetings). No dedicated curriculum director identified - superintendent is best contact.

title: Executive Director of Pupil Services
notes: Allie Willibey oversees preschool programming, special education, and pupil services. BG Preschool Program housed at Conneaut Elementary; Ann Rieman handles enrollment (x4031, arieman@bgcs.k12.oh.us). Inclusive preschool for all children with developmentally appropriate curriculum.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Green Local in Summit County operates Greenwood ELC (Green Primary). Carrie Marochino leads curriculum district-wide.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small district (PK-12, 2 schools) in Shelby County. Bill Reichert is superintendent and best contact - no dedicated ECE/curriculum director given district size. District has PreK-5 program. Email pattern likely first.last@jctigers.org.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Staff Development
notes: Maura Horgan has led curriculum/staff development since 2015. District runs Little Learners Preschool. Tara Boyer serves as Assistant Director of Curriculum (State and Federal Programs).

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment
notes: Reynoldsburg Early Learning Preschool Program uses HighScope Curriculum aligned to Ohio Early Learning Standards. Located at Livingston High School. Alyse Clark oversees curriculum district-wide. Email pattern typically first.last@reyn.org.

title: Executive Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: District runs C. Ray Williams Early Childhood Center with ODE Early Childhood Education Grant funding. Chris Hardy oversees T&L; also listed as Director of Accountability & Instruction. Preschool admin assistant Anna Farrow (614-417-5680). District domain is wcsrams.org. Email pattern likely first.last@wcsrams.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small rural district. Brad Romano has been superintendent 13+ years. District is regional leader in Science of Reading - all three buildings designated 'Science of Reading Champions.' No separate curriculum director identified at district level. Email pattern likely first.last@nlschools.org. Romano was named interim Mapleton supt May 2026.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Amy Miller-Colburn is Curriculum Director for Logan Elm in Pickaway County. Email format ends in @loganelm.org (confirmed pattern). District has Strategic Plan 2025-2028.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction / Interim Superintendent
notes: Christina Laudermilt serves as Director of Curriculum and Instruction; also currently Interim Superintendent (per March 2026 article). District has 1,676 students across 3 schools. Email pattern likely first.last@stcs.k12.oh.us.

title: Executive Director of Academic Achievement
notes: Marietta City (Washington County, OH - not Marietta GA). Dr. Jennifer Hernandez oversees Office of Academic Achievement including curriculum, instruction, assessment, technology. Tim Fleming is Director of Curriculum and Technology. New superintendent hired May 2025. District earned 2.5/5 stars on Ohio Report Card. Email pattern typically first.last@marietta-city.org.

title: Preschool Coordinator
notes: Forest Hills (Cincinnati, Hamilton County) runs preschool program aligned to Ohio Early Learning Standards. Julie Howard is dedicated Preschool Coordinator with certified teachers (BA minimum) for regular and special ed students. Strong ECE-relevant persona.

title: Director of Curriculum (and HR)
notes: Edgewood (Butler County) operates Edgewood Early Childhood Center with Lori Harrison as Principal. Alesia Beckett oversees curriculum and HR. Email confirmed as @edgewoodschools.net (not .com).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Ross Local (Butler County, Hamilton OH) runs tuition-based preschool at Morgan Elementary. William Rice became superintendent spring 2024 (formerly Asst Supt at Fairfield Schools). Emily Doblinger leads curriculum.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Wyoming City (Hamilton County) - Dr. Ericka Simmons recently named Assistant Superintendent. Previous AS Dr. Ashley Whitely left to become Lakota Local Superintendent. No separate curriculum director - Asst Supt holds curriculum oversight. Dr. Tracy Quattrone is Director of Pupil Services.

title: Director of Curriculum, Literacy & Instruction
notes: Small Cincinnati-area PreK-12 district (~740 students). Kenneth Griggs current Director of Curriculum (succeeding Susan Fraley in 2024-25). Superintendent Dr. Mimi Webb (mwebb@sbepschools.org). Email pattern first.last@sbepschools.org or initial+last format.

title: Superintendent
notes: Rural Allen County district (~1,100 students PK-12 on one campus). Mel Rentschler is current superintendent through July 31, 2026. Dr. Julie Willoughby (currently Urbana Schools' Director of Curriculum) succeeds him Aug 1, 2026 - relevant future contact for ECE work. No dedicated curriculum director given size.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small Darke County district. Has Early Childhood Calendar (operates ECE program). PJ Burgett is superintendent and best contact. Email domain is @ansoniaschools.org (not k12.oh.us).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small NW Ohio district (Fulton County) serving PreK-12. Jayson Selgo (sometimes Jason) is superintendent. Email domain is @archboldschools.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small K-12 district in Defiance County (2 schools). Brian Becher is superintendent. No dedicated curriculum or ECE director identified. Email domain is @ayersvillepilots.org.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Bay Village runs SEED preschool program (Alexa Davey, Director, 440-617-7330) for special needs preschoolers, plus Glenview Center for child care/learning. Robert Hoon oversees curriculum K-12. District domain is bayk12.org for staff email (email pattern likely first.last@bayk12.org).

title: Preschool Director
notes: District runs preschool with Greene County ESC - play-based developmentally appropriate curriculum aligned to Ohio standards. Traci Womack is dedicated Preschool Director. Strong ECE-relevant contact. Email pattern likely first.last@sugarcreek.k12.oh.us.

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment
notes: Berkshire (Geauga County) serves 1,400+ students PK-12 from Burton, Claridon, Montville, Thompson, Troy. Operates Berkshire Early Childhood Center with both traditional and special ed preschool. Matthew Morbeto leads curriculum. Superintendent Dr. John Stoddard. Email pattern likely first.last@berkshireschools.org or m.morbeto.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small district spanning Ashland/Lorain/Medina counties based in Sullivan. District participating in Medina County ESC search for shared Curriculum Director / Education Specialist. Chris Clark is best contact pending hire. Email domain is @blrv.org.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Allen County district. Greg Denecker is superintendent. Email pattern likely gdenecker@blufftonschools.org or first.last format. No separate ECE/curriculum director surfaced - 2.00 district administrators per ODE data.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Bridgeport (Belmont County) building 'The Bridge' $13.8M mixed-use education/workforce facility for 2026 - major capital project. Leslie Kosanovic leads curriculum. Brent Ripley is superintendent (brent.ripley@bridgeportschools.net). Active site is bridgeportschools.net. Email pattern likely first.last@bridgeportschools.net.

title: Director of Curriculum, Professional Development & Instructional Technology
notes: Brookville (Montgomery County, ~1,527 students PK-12). Stephanie Hinds is Director of Curriculum and also Foster Care Liaison / McKinney-Vento rep. Strong fit for ECE outreach.
